privileged_info_summary: The medical bill reconciliation task uses a synthetic dataset with 8 bills and 5 EOB entries. The dataset contains exactly 2 duplicate bills (City Hospital ER: $850, rows 1&3; Dr. Chen ER: $425, rows 2&6) totaling $1,275 in potential overpayment if not caught. One bill (Pharmacy $45, row 8) has no corresponding EOB entry. The task requires 75% pass threshold (6/8 success criteria) and has 240-second timeout.
